purpose: Plan the next 10 aiflow-driven governance rounds after GOFLY-GOV-10R4 convergence.

aiflowSubmission.safetyPolicy: P10 tasks are queued in gofly .aiflow runtime state only; commits remain owned by the current agent or human and runtime state remains ignored.

rounds.title: RPC Tier-1 closeout
rounds.objective: Strengthen gRPC compatibility, streaming behavior evidence, deadline/error-code mapping, retry and balancer contracts, and Kitex/go-zero coexistence documentation.
rounds.commitPolicy: commit after RPC boundary evidence and targeted RPC tests pass

rounds.title: goctl generator fidelity
rounds.objective: Improve deterministic regeneration, diff categories, .api/proto import edge cases, generated smoke fixtures, and rollback notes.
rounds.commitPolicy: commit after generated upgrade evidence and generator tests pass

rounds.title: Storage and cache productization
rounds.objective: Close go-zero sqlx/cache gaps around read/write strategy, transaction examples, generated model cache contracts, Redis/cache observability, and local smoke tests.
rounds.commitPolicy: commit after storage/cache gates and targeted tests pass

rounds.title: REST middleware ecosystem matrix
rounds.objective: Make JWT, CORS, CSRF, session, Prometheus, OpenTelemetry, SSE, and WebSocket middleware coverage migratable from go-zero and Gin-style services.
rounds.commitPolicy: commit after middleware evidence and REST/API smoke gates pass

rounds.title: Discovery adapter matrix
rounds.objective: Move discovery from abstraction to adapter evidence across memory, static, DNS, Kubernetes, Consul, Nacos, and etcd behavior boundaries.
rounds.commitPolicy: commit after discovery matrix and targeted discovery tests pass

rounds.title: AI-native support bundle
rounds.objective: Turn support bundle, doctor/release JSON, governance dashboard fields, control-plane snapshots, and remediation hints into an adopter workflow.

rounds.title: Performance budget ratchet
rounds.objective: Promote only benchmark rows with enough trend confidence while keeping weak-signal REST/RPC latency rows report-only.
rounds.commitPolicy: commit after benchmark evidence and regression gates pass

rounds.title: Cloud-native adoption proof
rounds.objective: Connect cloud-native rendering evidence, reference app topology, runtime SLOs, and adopter rollback notes into one production adoption proof.
rounds.commitPolicy: commit after cloud-native, reference app, and runtime SLO gates pass

rounds.title: Release dashboard consumption
rounds.objective: Expose release readiness, API tiers, security, coverage, benchmark ratchets, and aiflow task status as stable adopter-facing dashboard fields.
rounds.commitPolicy: commit after governance report and required-check drift gates pass

rounds.title: P10 convergence report
rounds.objective: Record per-round commits, skipped gates, ignored runtime paths, full governance verification, and next-wave follow-up recommendations.
rounds.commitPolicy: commit after convergence gate passes or environment-limited failures are documented
